task_completion.description: Verify a tracking module named 'HRPT_Downlink' is created and active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module tab or window title named 'HRPT_Downlink' in the GPredict interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the active ground station for the module is 'Kiruna'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the name 'Kiruna' in the module's header, status bar, or ground station configuration window if open.

task_completion.description: Verify the required satellites are being tracked in the module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the List view pane. The satellites NOAA 18, NOAA 19, METOP-B, and METOP-C must be listed.

task_completion.description: Verify the module layout consists of exactly two panes: a Map view and a List view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'HRPT_Downlink' module should be split into exactly two sections: one showing a world map and one showing a list of satellites.

task_completion.description: Verify the Map view uses a Topographical background and displays the Terminator line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map pane should show terrain/relief features (Topographical) rather than a plain or political map, and there should be a visible shaded region or line indicating the day/night boundary (Terminator).

task_completion.description: Verify the List view includes 'Range' and 'Range Rate' columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the column headers in the List view pane. 'Range' and 'Range Rate' must be clearly visible as column titles.

task_completion.description: Verify GPredict is maximized with the specified columns clearly visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GPredict application window should occupy the entire screen (maximized state), and the 'Range' and 'Range Rate' columns must not be cut off or hidden.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GPredict graphical interface, menus, or dialog boxes being interacted with, rather than just terminal commands editing configuration files.

integrity.description: Ensure the actual GPredict application is running.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown must be GPredict, identifiable by its standard interface, icons, and layout, not a text editor or a mock-up.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not simply write the expected output into a text file or terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshot must show the actual GPredict interface with the configured module, not a terminal window echoing the requirements or a text editor displaying the satellite names.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The ground station must be named 'Kiruna' (coordinates 67.8903 N, 21.0806 E, 330m altitude). The module must track exactly these satellites: NOAA 18 (NORAD 28654), NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591), METOP-B (NORAD 38771), and METOP-C (NORAD 43689).
